title: Healthy Meals on a $5 Budget

source.title: This chef will teach you how to make healthy $5 family dinners

segments.title: Rising Grocery Prices
segments.audioText: With rising grocery prices, many Americans are struggling to provide healthy, complete meals for their families.
segments.transcript: With rising grocery prices, many Americans are struggling to provide healthy, complete meals for their families.
segments.translationZh: 隨住雜貨價格上升，好多美國人都好難為家人準備健康又完整嘅餐。

points.label: With rising grocery prices
points.explanationZh: With 加背景原因；rising grocery prices 即雜貨價錢上升，新聞開頭好常用。

points.label: are struggling to provide
points.explanationZh: struggling to 表示『做得好吃力』；provide 係提供，通常後面接需要嘅嘢。

points.label: healthy, complete meals
points.explanationZh: healthy 同 complete 兩個形容詞連住聽，意思係健康而且營養完整。

segments.title: A Budget Story
segments.audioText: News Hour digital anchor Deema Zein has the story of one chef who teaches his TikTok followers how to eat well on a budget one $5 meal at a time.
segments.transcript: News Hour digital anchor Deema Zein has the story of one chef who teaches his TikTok followers how to eat well on a budget one $5 meal at a time.
segments.translationZh: NewsHour 數碼主播 Deema Zein 帶嚟一位廚師嘅故事，佢教 TikTok 追蹤者點樣用有限預算食得好，一次做一餐 5 美元嘅飯。

points.label: has the story of one chef
points.explanationZh: has the story 即『帶嚟呢個故事』，係新聞主播交畀記者時常見講法。

points.label: how to eat well on a budget
points.explanationZh: on a budget 即預算有限；eat well 唔一定貴，係食得好、食得有質素。

points.label: one $5 meal at a time
points.explanationZh: one...at a time 表示一步一步、一次一樣，呢度係每次做一餐 5 美元飯。

segments.title: A Tiny Budget
segments.audioText: High-energy and boiling over with positivity, he specializes in creating delicious recipes on a tiny budget.
segments.transcript: High-energy and boiling over with positivity, he specializes in creating delicious recipes on a tiny budget.
segments.translationZh: 佢充滿活力，又滿滿正能量，專門用好細嘅預算創作美味食譜。

points.label: High-energy
points.explanationZh: High-energy 形容人好有活力；聽新聞人物介紹時好常見。

points.label: boiling over with positivity
points.explanationZh: boiling over 字面係滿到瀉，呢度形容正能量多到溢出嚟。

points.label: on a tiny budget
points.explanationZh: tiny budget 即好細嘅預算；on a budget 呢組可以直接用喺日常。

segments.title: Shopping Choices
segments.audioText: Chef Moe takes his viewers through stores like Dollar General, explaining why he's choosing specific items, striving for balanced nutrition and budget.
segments.transcript: Chef Moe takes his viewers through stores like Dollar General, explaining why he's choosing specific items, striving for balanced nutrition and budget.
segments.translationZh: Chef Moe 帶觀眾行過 Dollar General 呢類商店，解釋點解揀某啲貨品，努力平衡營養同預算。

points.label: takes his viewers through stores
points.explanationZh: take someone through something 即帶人一步步睇或了解；呢度係帶觀眾逛店。

points.label: choosing specific items
points.explanationZh: specific items 指指定、特定嘅貨品；聽到 specific 要留意後面係咩。

points.label: balanced nutrition and budget
points.explanationZh: balanced 係平衡；nutrition and budget 一邊係營養，一邊係錢。

segments.title: Affordable Meals
segments.audioText: Comments pour in from people around the nation thankful for Chef Moe's creative approach to tasty and affordable meals.
segments.transcript: Comments pour in from people around the nation thankful for Chef Moe's creative approach to tasty and affordable meals.
segments.translationZh: 全國各地嘅留言大量湧入，大家都感謝 Chef Moe 用有創意嘅方法教人做美味又負擔得起嘅餐。

points.label: Comments pour in
points.explanationZh: pour in 即大量湧入；新聞常用嚟形容留言、支持、捐款等湧入。

points.label: from people around the nation
points.explanationZh: around the nation 即全國各地，比 across the country 意思相近。

points.label: tasty and affordable meals
points.explanationZh: tasty 係好味；affordable 係負擔得起，講食物、房租、服務都常用。

sentences: With rising grocery prices, many Americans are struggling to provide healthy, complete meals for their families.
News Hour digital anchor Deema Zein has the story of one chef who teaches his TikTok followers how to eat well on a budget one $5 meal at a time.
High-energy and boiling over with positivity, he specializes in creating delicious recipes on a tiny budget.
Chef Moe takes his viewers through stores like Dollar General, explaining why he's choosing specific items, striving for balanced nutrition and budget.
Comments pour in from people around the nation thankful for Chef Moe's creative approach to tasty and affordable meals.

vocabulary.example: Grocery prices are rising in many places.
vocabulary.translationZh: 好多地方嘅雜貨價格都上升緊。

vocabulary.example: Some families are struggling to buy healthy food.
vocabulary.translationZh: 有啲家庭買健康食物都覺得吃力。

vocabulary.example: We need to cook dinner on a small budget.
vocabulary.translationZh: 我哋要用細預算煮晚餐。

vocabulary.example: The chef specializes in simple family meals.
vocabulary.translationZh: 呢位廚師專門做簡單家庭餐。

vocabulary.example: He explains why he chooses specific items.
vocabulary.translationZh: 佢解釋點解揀特定貨品。

vocabulary.example: Balanced nutrition matters, even on a budget.
vocabulary.translationZh: 即使用有限預算，均衡營養都好重要。

vocabulary.meaningZh: 負擔得起嘅；價錢合理嘅
vocabulary.example: The meal is tasty and affordable.
vocabulary.translationZh: 呢餐又好味又負擔得起。

phrases.example: We are trying to eat well on a budget.

phrases.meaningZh: 一次處理一餐；一步一步嚟
phrases.example: He teaches people to save money one meal at a time.
Chef Moe takes his viewers through the store.
Comments pour in from people around the nation.

speakingPractice.instructionZh: 由 00:00 跟讀第一句，留意 With rising grocery prices 呢個背景開頭。
重播 00:28，先聽 High-energy，再補 boiling over with positivity。
用 on a budget 練替換：I cook healthy meals on a budget.
用兩句英文複述：Chef Moe teaches people how to eat well on a budget. His meals are tasty and affordable.

notes: 今日重點係聽生活新聞入面關於食物、價錢同家庭預算嘅講法。
先用時間碼盲聽一遍，再睇 transcript；有啲句子較長，可以按 comma 分 chunk。
on a budget、specific items、affordable meals 都係日常美式英語好實用嘅組合。
dailyLifePractice 會配合食物同購物主題，練問店員、替換食材同簡短講預算。

dailyLifePractice.title: Asking for Help in a Store
dailyLifePractice.contextZh: 場景：你喺超市搵唔到平價食材，要自然問店員。
dailyLifePractice.audioText: Excuse me, do you know where the canned beans are? I'm trying to make dinner on a budget. Thanks, that helps a lot.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Excuse me, do you know where the canned beans are?
lines.zh: 唔好意思，你知唔知罐頭豆喺邊度？

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Great, thanks. I'm trying to make dinner on a budget.
lines.zh: 好，多謝。我想用有限預算整晚餐。

lines.speaker: Clerk
lines.en: Aisle five should have a few good options.
lines.zh: 第五條通道應該有幾款唔錯嘅選擇。

dailyLifePractice.nativeNoteZh: Excuse me 開頭最自然又有禮。on a budget 係美國日常好常用，唔使講得太尷尬，直接表示你想控制開支。

drills.label: Substitution
drills.prompt: 將 canned beans 換成 rice、pasta 或 frozen vegetables。
drills.example: Do you know where the frozen vegetables are?

drills.label: Quick repeat
drills.prompt: 跟讀 I'm trying to make dinner on a budget 三次。
drills.example: I'm trying to make dinner on a budget.

dailyLifePractice.title: Choosing a Substitute
dailyLifePractice.contextZh: 場景：你想買嘅食材冇貨，要問朋友可唔可以用另一樣代替。
dailyLifePractice.audioText: They don't have chicken thighs today. Would ground turkey work instead? It's cheaper, and it cooks pretty fast.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: They don't have chicken thighs today.

lines.speaker: Friend
lines.zh: 可唔可以用第二樣代替？

lines.speaker: You
lines.zh: 用火雞免治肉代替得唔得？

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: It's cheaper, and it cooks pretty fast.

dailyLifePractice.nativeNoteZh: Would ... work instead? 係好自然嘅替代問法，語氣比 Can I use...? 更商量。pretty fast 係口語，意思係幾快。

drills.label: Polite rephrase
drills.prompt: 用 Would ... work instead? 問另一個替代食材。

drills.label: Short response
drills.prompt: 用 Yeah, that should work 回應對方建議。

dailyLifePractice.title: Splitting the Grocery Cost
dailyLifePractice.contextZh: 場景：你同朋友一齊煮飯，簡單講點樣分擔買餸錢。
dailyLifePractice.audioText: The total came out to about twelve dollars. We can split it if you want. That makes it six each.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: The total came out to about twelve dollars.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: We can split it if you want.
lines.zh: 你想嘅話，我哋可以平分。

lines.speaker: Friend
lines.en: Sure. How much is that each?

dailyLifePractice.nativeNoteZh: came out to about... 係講帳單或總價好自然嘅方式。We can split it if you want 聽落輕鬆，唔會逼對方一定要畀錢。

drills.label: Substitution
drills.prompt: 用 came out to about... 換唔同總價。
drills.example: The total came out to about eighteen dollars.

drills.label: Role-play
drills.prompt: 你講總價，對方問每人幾多，你用 That makes it...each 回答。
